issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (passive static ability), not 'Activated'. This effect is a passive condition check that grants Blocker when the condition is met, not an activated ability.
Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (DON!! attached to this card), not 'HasRestingDon'. The card text '10 DON!! cards on your field' refers to DON!! attached to this character.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have 10 DON!! cards on your field, this Character gains [Blocker].
